blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Verify inclusion of photo/video release in waiver form
Check if the waiver form includes a section for photo/video release.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of a photo/video release within the same form as part of the liability waiver. However, the evidence from the linked use case does not explicitly confirm that the photo/video release is included in the same form as required. The use case mentions a photo/video release but does not provide concrete evidence that it is part of the same document as the liability waiver, leading to a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the photo/video release is included within the same form as the liability waiver.
